subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Your letter was perused with the utmost joy and delight. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء نامه شما بنهایت انبساط و ابتهاج ملاحظه گردید الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @light and darkness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
